name: get_item
description: Retrieve a single content record by its unique ID. Returns all field values, metadata, and relationship data for the record. Use the 'version' parameter to fetch either the published or draft version of the record.

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the content record to retrieve.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Set to 'current' for the latest draft version or 'published' for the published version. Default: 'published'.

attributes.title: Getting Started with DatoCMS
attributes.body: Welcome to DatoCMS. This guide will help you get started...
attributes.author: Jane Doe
